name: ModernFlow 1 — Apollo Lead Sourcing → Google Sheets

parameters.jsCode:
// 5 pages x 100 results = ~500 leads
return [1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map(page => ({ json: { page } }));

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ page: $json.page, per_page: 100, person_titles: ['Owner', 'Founder', 'CEO', 'President', 'General Manager'], person_locations: ['United States'], organization_num_employees_ranges: ['1,10', '11,50', '51,200'], q_organization_keyword_tags: ['plumbing', 'hvac', 'electrical', 'roofing', 'landscaping', 'general contractor', 'home services'], contact_email_status: ['verified'] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const res = $input.first().json;
const matches = res.matches || [];
return matches
  .filter(m => m && m.email)
  .map(m => ({
    json: {
      apollo_id: m.id || '',
      first_name: m.first_name || '',
      last_name: m.last_name || '',
      title: m.title || '',
      company: (m.organization && m.organization.name) || '',
      industry: (m.organization && m.organization.industry) || '',
      email: m.email,
      linkedin_url: m.linkedin_url || '',
      website: (m.organization && m.organization.website_url) || '',
      city: m.city || '',
      state: m.state || '',
      status: 'NEW',
      thread_id: '',
      interest_score: '',
      last_contact_at: '',
      notes: ''
    }
  }));
